(1) These rules may be called the Special Economic Zones (Amendment) Rules, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Special Economic Zones Rules, 2006, in Annexure III, against serial number 7, in column (3), after the words “Andhra Pradesh”, the word “Telangana”, shall be inserted. [F. No. C . 1/1/2014-SEZ] R A J E E V A R O R A , Jt. Secy. Note :—The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number G.S.R. 54(E), dated the 10th February, 2006 and last amended vide number G.S.R. 540(E), dated the 12th August, 2013. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
